$comment: TESTNET DEMO ENTRY ONLY. Do not use to verify mainnet anchors. The mainnet entry will be added when FleetFusion's mainnet account is published — see TODO below.
TODO: Add the FleetFusion mainnet entry when the production XRPL account is published. The mainnet entry MUST live in a separate platform-account.json under a /mainnet/ subdirectory, OR be appended to the registry array here with network='mainnet'. The verifier rejects with 'network-mismatch' (D5) if the rippled tx network doesn't match the matching registry entry.
